blocks.text: Carlsen's Playoff Charge Tops a Star-Studded Thursday
Thursday delivers chess royalty, a Norwegian CS2 icon in a major final, and a La Liga title race twist — all before midnight. Three events with genuine stakes, one unmissable Norwegian angle each.
♟️ Magnus Carlsen opens his Chess.com Open playoff campaign — Round of 16, Game 1 at 17:15
🎮 rain and 100 Thieves face BIG in the CCT Global Finals — Norway's CS2 legend on the server at 17:00
⛳ Zurich Classic of New Orleans continues — PGA Tour teams format tees off at 06:00
